home.seo_title: Mikel's Earth | Natural Products & Gourmet Olive Oil Since 1819
home.seo_description: Natural products and gourmet olive oil handcrafted since 1819. Family tradition, quality and unique gastronomic experiences from Lleida, Spain.
home.hero_subtitle: Since 1819, seven generations have tended the same land, kept the same secrets, shared the same passion.
home.hero_text: We are not a brand. We are a family from Lleida, Spain, who do things the way they were always done: with time, with hands, with soul.
home.manifesto_title: Why We Do What We Do
home.manifesto_p1: In a world where everything is mass-produced, where machines have replaced hands, where speed matters more than quality... we choose a different path.
home.manifesto_p2: We choose slowness. We choose craftsmanship. We choose to do things right, even if it costs more, takes longer, or is harder.
home.manifesto_p3: Because we believe there are things that cannot be automated. Like the love for the land. Like respect for tradition. Like the pride of putting your name on a product.
home.pillar_tradition_text: 7 generations since 1819. Every recipe is a treasure passed from parents to children.
home.pillar_terroir_text: Alcarràs and Córdoba. Lands that produce flavours impossible to replicate.
home.pillar_craft_text: Handmade, unhurried, no shortcuts. Just as it was done 200 years ago.
home.pillar_transparency_text: We open our doors. Come and see how we work.
home.jewels_subtitle: Every product is a treasure. Crafted with dedication, packaged with care, created to honour over 200 years of family tradition.
home.product_paraguayo_desc: The flat peach that won our hearts over a century ago. Sweet, aromatic, perfect.
home.product_temprano_desc: Intense, peppery, full of character. Made from green olives harvested early in the season.
home.product_pack_desc: Discover our entire story in a carefully curated pack.
home.commitment_p1: Part of our profits go to causes close to our hearts. We collaborate with Ileris, a centre for people with special needs who help us package our products with dedication and care. We also support the Agonlinhossouyetokandji Foundation in Benin, which works tirelessly to improve the lives of orphaned children and the elderly.
home.commitment_p2: Because we believe success only makes sense when shared. Because the land has given us so much, and it is time to give back. Every product you buy helps build a fairer, more supportive world.
home.commitment_quote: "Doing good is part of our DNA"
home.cta_subtitle: When you choose Mikel's Earth, you are not just buying a product. You are joining a tradition of over 200 years. You become part of a family that believes in doing things right.
home.cta_visit_text: Discover our workshop and live the experience
home.cta_shop_text: Receive our treasures at your doorstep

footer.company_desc: Family tradition since 1819. Natural, artisan and vegan products from Lleida, Spain.
footer.copyright: Copyright © 2025 Mikel's Earth - All rights reserved

products.contact_text: If you can't find what you're looking for or have any questions about our products, don't hesitate to contact us. We'll be happy to help.

reviews_page.page_subtitle: What people who have tried our products say
reviews_page.verified_info_text_1: The "Verified purchase" badge indicates that we have been able to confirm that the person leaving the review has made a real purchase in our shop. Our system automatically cross-references the reviewer's email with our completed order records.
reviews_page.verified_info_text_2: Reviews without this badge are equally valid and real — we simply could not automatically link them to an order (for example, if the customer used a different email from their purchase, or left the review via the public form).
reviews_page.verified_info_text_3: All published reviews are reviewed by our team before appearing on the website. We do not edit or censor negative reviews.
reviews_page.share_experience: Share your experience and receive a 10% discount on your next order as a thank you.
reviews_page.form_success: Thank you for your review! We've sent you a 10% discount code to your email.
